evals.prompt:
Parse this The Verge design system into vizual DesignTokens. The document is very long with colors scattered throughout prose, component specs, and tables. Extract ALL colors, typography, spacing, and radius tokens.

[PASTE THE FULL VERGE DESIGN.md HERE]
evals.expected_output: DesignTokens JSON with 15-25 colors, typography with fontFamily + sizes (10+) + weights (4-6), spacing with baseUnit + scale, radius with scale (5-7 entries)

evals.prompt:
I have a minimal design system for my fintech app. Parse it into vizual DesignTokens format:

## Brand Colors
- Primary: #4F46E5 (indigo, used for CTAs and links)
- Success: #059669
- Warning: #D97706
- Error: #DC2626
- Background: #FAFAFA
- Card BG: #FFFFFF
- Text: #111827
- Subtle text: #6B7280

## Typography
We use Inter for everything. Body is 14px, headings go 16/20/24/32px. Weights: regular 400, medium 500, bold 700.

## Spacing
4px base, scale: 4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32

## Border Radius
Buttons and cards: 8px, pills: 9999px, inputs: 6px
evals.expected_output: DesignTokens JSON with 8+ colors properly named, typography with fontFamily Inter + 5 sizes + 3 weights, spacing scale space-1 to space-6, radius with sm/md/pill

evals.prompt:
帮我把这个 Linear 风格的设计系统解析成 vizual 的 DesignTokens JSON：

整体风格：暗色系，类似 Linear.app 的极简风格。

颜色方案（暗色模式）：
背景主色 #0A0A0B，卡片 #141415，输入框/悬浮 #1C1C1E
边框 #1F1F22，微弱边框 #2A2A2D
文字 #EDEDEF，次要文字 #7C7C85，禁用 #4A4A50
品牌蓝 #5E6AD2，悬停 #7B85D9，浅底 rgba(94,106,210,0.15)
成功 #4DAF73，警告 #E2A03F，错误 #E5534B
等宽字体背景 #0D0D10

字体：使用 -apple-system, 等宽用 SF Mono。正文 13px，小字 12px，标题 14/16/20px
间距：4px 为基础单位，有 4/8/12/16/20/24
圆角：小 4px，中 6px，大 8px
阴影：卡片用 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)
evals.expected_output: DesignTokens JSON with 12+ colors including rgba values, complete typography sizes + weights, spacing scale, radius scale
